name: AI Consumer Idea Portfolio
description: # Consumer AI Idea Portfolio This is a plain-text idea scan in the same shape as a venture brainstorm. The draft command turns these rows into an editable `IdeaPortfolioRequest`, then the runner scores them across synthetic consumer segments and launch scen...
notes: Portfolio tested `12` ideas across `7` scenarios and `6` audience segments.
`concierge` is the recommended idea with score `55`.
`TikTok/IG Viral Launch` is the least decisive scenario; gather more evidence there.
